scrape.description:
Bluefin Real Estate proudly presents a 2-Bedroom Apartment in The Pinnacle – Dubai, offering a perfect blend of comfort, space, and convenience in a well-connected location. 

This spacious 2-bedroom apartment is thoughtfully designed with a functional layout, featuring a bright living and dining area, well-sized bedrooms, a fitted kitchen, and modern bathrooms. Large windows allow natural light to fill the space, creating a warm and inviting home environment ideal for families. 

The Pinnacle provides residents with essential lifestyle amenities including a swimming pool, fully equipped gym, 24/7 security, and dedicated parking, ensuring a comfortable and secure living experience. 
Located in a prime area, the building offers easy access to supermarkets, schools, restaurants, and public transport, along with seamless connectivity to major roads and key destinations across Dubai. 

Property Highlights:
Spacious 2-bedroom apartmentBright and functional layoutWell-maintained buildingSwimming pool & gym24/7 security and parkingClose to daily conveniences and transport
The Pinnacle – comfortable family living in a convenient Dubai location.
